--- SOURCE 1: Rothy's shoes can now be recycled again and again (and again) ---
URL: https://www.fastcompany.com/90810803/rothys-new-ballet-flat-can-can-be-recycled-again-and-again-and-again

SUMMARY:
Thanks to a new recycling program, Rothy's accepts customers' old shoes, then melts the plastic in them once more to create a new pair.

![An animation showing an image of a plastic bottle and The Point II in Black, with copy overlay reading "THE POSSIBILITY OF PLASTIC | 200,647,202+ Millions of recycled bottles are just the beginning."](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/preview_images/dc92881a51ba4e9481605555a533df9d.thumbnail.0000000000.jpg?v=1731538371&width=2160)

# 

![](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/preview_images/f6bf63ae9ec241f5ab2b65a14c638a44.thumbnail.0000000000.jpg?v=1720092585&width=2880)

## 

![](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/9.19_SustainabiltyHub_Mobile_2_pQsKUQhUyx.jpg?v=1726183814&width=750)

## TRUE Zero-Waste & LEED Gold certified.

We built our own best-in-class factory—one that is proudly **LEED Gold** and **TRUE Zero-Waste Certified**.

![A close up shot of our rPET knit in bright blue.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/7.09_Retheme_Sustainability_Desktop_3_cTHowThBB9_abfba39b-49bd-468d-ad01-074159f0908d.jpg?v=1719817401&width=1080)

## 770,000 lbs saved per year.

Our knit to shape technique creates **less than 1% upper material waste** compared to 25%-50% in typical shoe and bag manufacturing.

![An image of green plastic bottles with copy overlay reading "715,353+lbs of marine plastic kept out of oceans. We use marine plastic in all our bags. It's collected within 30 miles of coastlines where there are no formal recycling programs, meaning it'd otherwise likely end up in the water."](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/11.18_SustainabiltyHub_Desktop_5_bLZ1NzaOsH.jpg?v=1731969853&width=2160)

## 

![An image of a black shoe over a background of plastic bottles, and copy overlay reading "Recycled Plastic Bottles | We’ve kept hundreds of thousands of single-use plastic bottles out of landfills by using them as our signature thread, which is knit into every product we make."](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/9.19_SustainabiltyHub_Desktop_6.1_mEjzvbOomF_73c20277-bf00-4723-a9c7-8ec76eb7d5b3.jpg?v=1726751740&width=720)
![An image of a black shoe over a background of hemp leaves, and copy overlay reading "Natural Hemp | Hemp is found in some of the oldest textiles on earth, but we think it’s a material of the future. It has potential to be regenerative in removing carbon from air and restoring soil health."](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/9.19_SustainabiltyHub_Desktop_7_gYMwFUCQL1_8a3de1f9-0ca4-483e-88c9-532cc96fa92c.jpg?v=1726751782&width=720)
![An image of a black shoe over a background of fluffy wool, and copy overlay reading "RWS-Certified Merino Wool | Our soft, cozy merino wool is RWS-Certified, which means the farmers we work with must meet rigorous animal welfare, land management and social requirements."](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/9.19_SustainabiltyHub_Desktop_8_UF8ikfBW4M_0a3b241e-016e-44b6-8f9f-2a74a59cf793.jpg?v=1726751839&width=720)
![A woman holding a stack of cardboard boxes, wearing The Square Mary Jane in Lollipop Red.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/7.09_Retheme_Sustainability_Desktop_7_5tl8rQ0xWt_c774a191-7cc7-4801-b9fe-899ca9756608.jpg?v=1719817401&width=1080)

## 3,300,000+ lbs of cardboard saved.

Our boxes are made from recycled materials and incredibly sturdy. They ship directly to our customers without needing to be put in a stronger box, which has saved over 3 million lbs. of cardboard to date—enough to cover an entire football field!

![An animation showing durability testing on a Rothy's Bucket Bag.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/7.09_Retheme_Sustainability_Desktop_9_wyRO0ahbjY.gif?v=1719817401&width=540)

## Machine washable & long lasting.

Fast fashion is an enormous burden on the planet. We believe in only making products that are durable enough to last for years—and are machine washable, so they’re like new over and over again. And the proof’s in our durability testing: Our super-strong bag handles can hold over 100 pounds!

![](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/2025_Poshmark_SustainabiltyHub_Desktop_1_bjlveKu4D0.jpg?v=1744306337&width=1080)
![](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/2025_Poshmark_SustainabiltyHub_Desktop_2_822t5eTz8N_1.jpg?v=1744306326&width=1080)

\*See how we calculate this number [here](/pages/sustainability-calculations "Our calculation methodology.").

![Model wearing The Casual Clog in Soft Black Hemp.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/05.29_XSell_Square_Mobile_3_hZRQWiizfg.jpg?v=1748475454&width=1020)
![Woman wearing the penny loafer in cortado.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/07.17_WNewArrivals_InGrids_Desktop_2_dpLvcAKRTA.jpg?v=1752696397&width=1020)
![Model wearing The Almond Slingback in Black.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/05.29_XSell_Square_Mobile_4_WqHmqIB19Z.jpg?v=1748475707&width=1020)

![A short video showing the process of recycling Rothy's shoes, with a copy overlay reading "Rothy's Recycling"](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/preview_images/826e5c3d97894f97b67d22760a627626.thumbnail.0000000000.jpg?v=1720180731&width=1920)

# 

## Recycling shoes gives old Rothy's new life.

Recycling shoes gives old Rothy's new life.

At Rothy’s, sustainability is at the heart of all we do. We have big goals to achieve circular production, which includes keeping Rothy’s out of landfills. Now, when your Rothy’s have reached the end, they’ll be recycled into something new.

![A graphic that reads: How it works. Step 1: Give us your old Rothy's. Bring your read-to-recycle Rothy's to a Rothy's store and pass them off to a retail ambassador. Step 2: Get your credit. We'll give you a $20 discount code for each pair of adult shoes, kids shoes, or bag you recycle.* Step 3: Close the loop. Your old Rothy's are sent to our disassembly and recycling partners where they'll be broken down, separated by material and recycled into new uses.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/6.10_Retheme_BrandPages_RecyclingProgram_HIW_Desktop_XGmNwoR0Ct.jpg?v=1719817406&width=2160)

## 

![The Point II in Black standing upright with an empty plastic bottle.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/8.19_RecyclingProgram_Desktop_OxZtHLQLKd_c9960ee8-e2a0-49ae-9cc9-ac221fac6bce.jpg?v=1724449331&width=1080)

## Keeping Rothy's out of the landfill no matter what.

We design our products for durability and longevity. So if you're ready to  
part with a pair of Rothy's that are still in great shape, finding them a new  
home through reselling, gifting or donating is always an option.

But when a pair of Rothy's has reached the end of its life and are no longer  
wearable, Rothy's Recycling prevents them from ending up in a landfill. By  
recycling and repurposing materials, we're helping to close the loop.

![A graphic showing the proccess of taking apart shoes in the factory.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/6.10_Retheme_BrandPages_RecyclingProgram_Desktop_2_Oakn2Uc2DM.jpg?v=1719817404&width=1080)

## Recycling in review.

We send your well-loved Rothy’s to our disassembly partners who take the shoe apart and separate it into the upper, insole and outsole. Once the materials are separated, they’re either shredded or baled and shipped to our recycling partners.

![A graphic showing the proccess of breaking down materials.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/6.10_Retheme_BrandPages_RecyclingProgram_Desktop_3_Si93WiZc6q.jpg?v=1719817405&width=1080)

## Intentional materials.

The uppers, made from our signature thread, can be recycled again into thread. The foam insoles and midsoles are ground and can be used as carpet backing or insulation. The TPU or rubber outsoles are ground and can be used in athletic flooring.

![A close up graphic of our materials.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/6.10_Retheme_BrandPages_RecyclingProgram_Desktop_4_OK2qHAJ63M.jpg?v=1719817406&width=1080)

## Innovations in recycling.

Over time, we'll continue to improve and iterate on these recycling processes as we work toward our circularity goals—like using twice-recycled thread in our products in the future.

![A graphic that reads: Have questions? Keep learning about Rothy's Recycling. A button reads: Read FAQs.](//rothys.com/cdn/shop/files/09.12_RecyclingProgram_FAQ_Desktop_1b16ee7f-4475-44eb-ad1a-87b990c665f3.jpg?v=1719817404&width=2880)

enriched_points.expanded_content: Rothy's is an eco-friendly footwear brand that creates stylish shoes from recycled plastic bottles, promoting sustainable fashion and reducing plastic waste.
Rothy's utilizes a unique process where single-use plastic bottles are transformed into thread, which is then knitted into fashionable footwear, ensuring minimal waste.
Rothy's upcycling efforts prevent over 50 million plastic bottles from ending up in landfills annually, contributing to significant reductions in environmental pollution.
